summary: Sprint 3 backend testing: Digital Incubator (7 stages) + AI Assistant (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations). All endpoints working. Login with test2@test.com successful (token key='token').
passed: GET /api/incubator/stages -> 200, returns 7 stages with ids [1..7], each has name+icon
POST /api/incubator/ideas -> 200, creates idea with 7 stage entries (all progress=0) and overall_progress=0
GET /api/incubator/ideas -> 200, returns current user's ideas including newly created one
GET /api/incubator/ideas/{id} -> 200, returns idea with 7 stages and overall_progress
PUT /api/incubator/ideas/{id}/stage {stage:1, progress:100, notes:'done'} -> overall_progress=14 (round(100/700*100)=14), stage 1 updated correctly
POST /api/ai/assist {task:'project_names', context:'مقهى'} -> 200, returns non-empty Arabic 'result' string with 10 project names (Claude Sonnet 4.5 confirmed working via emergentintegrations)
POST /api/ai/assist invalid task -> 400 with detail 'نوع المهمة غير مدعوم'
notes: Login response uses 'token' (not 'access_token'). Backend log shows one prior 'Budget exceeded' error on emergent LLM key, but subsequent AI calls succeed - key currently working. No blockers.
